title: AI as a Human Experience | Exploring AI Models: The Future of Machine Learning - Part 2 | Horizons
fulltitle: AI as a Human Experience | Exploring AI Models: The Future of Machine Learning - Part 2 | Horizons
description:
As AI becomes more integrated into everyday life, the line between humans and technology continues to blur. What if you could communicate with AI faster than typing, speaking or even thinking?

In this episode of Horizons, tech artist and CEO of Future Proof Creatives, Kris Krüg explores the intersection of AI and the future of human experience. From brain-computer interfaces to real-time thought-to-AI interactions, we are entering a new era in which AI isn’t just a tool—it’s an extension of ourselves.

As advancements in generative AI tools reshape the way we connect with technology, they also raise important questions:
How will AI change the way we create and innovate?
What ethical challenges come with merging AI and the human mind?
Could AI-enhanced creativity redefine the limits of human potential?

Watch all videos: https://horizons.compassdatacenters.com/series/exploring-ai-models-the-future-of-machine-learning
#Horizons #FutureOfWork #GenerativeAI @van_ai
